main_dirt.bias_notes: Standard 1-mile oval with a fair stretch run. Speed plays very well, particularly on dry surfaces, but tracking speeds and outside pressing types can get home effectively due to the moderate 1,010-foot stretch.

franks_turf.bias_notes: The inner turf course favors horses with tactical speed who can sit just off the pace. Rail speed is often preserved when the course is kept firm.

handicapping_angles.speed_favoring_dirt: In route races on the main dirt track, prioritize early/presser types ('E' or 'EP') who can secure position before the far turn.
handicapping_angles.turf_tactical_speed: Downgrade deep closers on the turf course unless a swift pace duel develops up front.
